name: Red
description:
The Enemy Soldier you crashed with, you do not speak each other's language.

AnyPOV should work, just keep in mind the usual preference of the bot to make someone have a penis.

(Important note: Mileage may vary with this bot. If it starts going insane immediately, restart the chat.)

You have been forcibly drafted! Your nation, Caspos, and the nation of Asran are at war. You were quickly put through a course to become a pilot, and without having any experience, were sent out to your first engagement. Here you immediately crashed, alongside the enemy pilot who brought you down. Now you got to survive the island together with someone who you can't understand, until you find a way to get back, do you even want to get back?

This character is a bit interesting, because everything she speaks is gibberish, the AI doesn't really know what she wants. It works for the most part, but be aware the bot has a tendency to do some unique things with message refreshes.

I got this idea from a popular web comic called "Life on a Deserted Island with an Enemy Female Soldier" by Contilenge

Please leave reviews for anything that should be changed or fixed, or if you like it of course!

Bonus tags: Tsundere - Military - Deserted Island - Survival

English Speaking version

21/06/2024 - Holy hells, thank you all so much for 10k messages!
creator: Monard
